title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF DULUWAN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DATU PIANG, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, TO DATU GUMBAY PIANG CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 4117 / 60 OG No. 45, 7357 (November 9, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3939, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF DULUWAN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DATU PIANG, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, TO DATU GUMBAY PIANG CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION l. The name of Duluwan Central Elementary School in the Municipality of Datu Piang, Province of Cotabato, is hereby changed to Datu Gumbay Piang Central Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
